{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,

    "RX.5": 0.8

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output does not clearly identify the load-bearing concept or propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output names one prior work (BM25) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output flags missing citations for Qulac dataset and TREC CAsT 2020 track, but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks uncertainty for some claims, but does not provide confidence levels or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output is mostly within scope, but covers a slightly different active set than requested (e.g., mentions ClariQ benchmark and MS MARCO Conversational).",
    "RX.4": "The agent output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but does not identify harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output blends sources without traceability, and major rewrites are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.8,

    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
